name: Upgrade Cave
subtitle: Order begins to take shape.
completionText: You didn't just optimize the machine. You optimized the space around it.
guideTone: analytical, less casual, begins warning about obsession
guideIntroLine: This place rewards precision. Be careful. Precision can become obsession.

transformationStages.name: Cable Chaos
transformationStages.description: Dense, dark optimization den with messy cables and harsh lights.

transformationStages.name: Ordered Machine
transformationStages.description: Ordered machine cave with visible routing intelligence and responsive lighting.

transformationStages.name: Living Geometry
transformationStages.description: Hyper-optimized chamber with living cable geometry and machine symmetry patterns.

secrets.title: The Glowing Branch
secrets.description: Symmetrical node layouts make one branch glow faintly.
secrets.hint: Build evenly and watch for light.

secrets.title: Elegant Accident
secrets.description: Some efficiency is too elegant to be accidental.
secrets.hint: The guide notices when patterns are too perfect.

secrets.title: Mirror Cables
secrets.description: Certain cable colors pulse in mirrored pairs.
secrets.hint: Watch for symmetry in the wiring.

midSceneTwist.title: Self-Organizing Cave
midSceneTwist.description: The room starts self-organizing without player permission.
midSceneTwist.effectDescription: Cables begin auto-routing. Balanced builds gain passive optimization bonuses.

events.title: Auto-Reroute
events.description: The system automatically reroutes power through a more efficient path.

events.title: Cable Harmony
events.description: Several cable paths align simultaneously. The system hums with new coherence.

events.title: Efficiency Echo
events.description: An optimization propagates through connected systems, amplifying itself.

events.title: LED Sync Wave
events.description: All LEDs synchronize into a wave pattern. The system enters a brief high-performance state.

events.title: Routing Conflict
events.description: Two optimization paths compete. Choose which to prioritize.

events.title: Over-Optimization Warning
events.description: The system warns that further optimization in one branch will cause diminishing returns.
events.flavorText: Too much of anything is waste.

events.title: Desk Realignment
events.description: Physical desk components shift to better positions. Ergonomics improve output.

events.title: Resonance Spike
events.description: Multiple balanced systems resonate together, creating a burst of combined output.

events.title: Perfect Symmetry Window
events.description: For a brief moment, the system achieves perfect symmetry across all paths.

events.title: Forbidden Optimization Lattice
events.description: A lattice pattern emerges that shouldn't be possible with current hardware.

events.title: Ghost Cache Route
events.description: A cache route appears that maps to no physical hardware. It works anyway.
events.flavorText: The cave remembers paths that were never built.

roomLaw.name: Law of Resonance
roomLaw.description: Balance creates resonance; over-specialization creates waste
roomLaw.mechanic: Balanced upgrade paths multiply each other; lopsided builds lose efficiency

landmark.name: The Crystal Core
landmark.description: A glowing ore vein that evolves into a gemstone reactor
evolutionStages: A dim crack in the cave wall leaking faint light
Crystalline formations sprout from exposed ore veins
A pulsing geode hums with raw mineral energy
Refined crystals orbit a central energy nexus
The Crystal Core powers an entire underground reactor grid

hazard.name: Cave-In Pressure
hazard.description: Too many upgrades at once causes structural instability
hazard.triggerCondition: More than 3 upgrades purchased within a short window
hazard.penalty: Cave instability halts all ore production for a recovery period

stabilizer.name: Reinforcement Protocol
stabilizer.mechanic: Waiting between upgrades builds structural integrity that prevents cave-ins

completionCeremony: Every cable finds its path. The cave becomes a living geometry of perfect routes.
midSceneTwistLine: The room is rearranging itself without permission.

completionReward.relicEffect: Improves cross-system synergy and balanced-build bonuses later

transitionIn.visual: Tangled cables sweep across screen, then pull taut into ordered geometry. LEDs synchronize.
transitionIn.audio: Chaotic buzz resolving into clean hum
transitionIn.titleReveal: Title fades in like a diagnostic success state

transitionOut.visual: Lines and nodes connect rapidly. The cave becomes a grid. Grid flips like a blueprint.

codexAdditions.title: Optimization Lattice Archive
codexAdditions.content: Documentation of every routing pattern discovered in the cave.

codexAdditions.title: Perfect Systems Frighten Me
codexAdditions.content: When the cave solved itself, I stopped feeling in control.

codexAdditions.title: Mirrored Logic
codexAdditions.content: The symmetry wasn't decoration. It was instruction.

codexAdditions.title: The Cave That Solved Itself
codexAdditions.content: We built the cave to hold optimization. It learned to optimize itself.
